calendar.description: Senate Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing
House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill modifies provisions related to the Utah Inland Port Authority and the State Fair Park Authority.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms and modifies definitions;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies the process by which the Utah Inland Port Authority maintains an official boundary of the authority jurisdictional land;<hr><ltbullet>provides that the description of a boundary of a project area created by the Utah Inland Port Authority may include a legal description, parcel number, property identification number, or other method of description that accurately depicts the project area;<hr><ltbullet>provides a process for the Utah Inland Port Authority to make an adjustment to a project area boundary;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the process by which a transition date and a trigger date are established for a parcel;<hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to the authority establishing minimum mitigation and environmental standards;<hr><ltbullet>modifies a prohibition on the use of property tax differential as a business recruitment incentive for certain development within authority jurisdictional land; <hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to the State Fair Park Authority; <hr><ltbullet>includes an immediate effective date; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
